notes: Integrated 2-inch color screen + 3 buttons + battery management + magnetic shell, ready to use out of the box. Few GPIO pins exposed, limited expandability

onboard_peripherals.name: ILI9342C LCD
onboard_peripherals.notes: 320x240, 2.0 inch TFT. SPI bus always occupied (only hardware SPI). rst=-1 means controlled by ESP32 RST pin, no GPIO occupied; backlight=-1 means always on by default, no GPIO occupied

onboard_peripherals.name: MPU6886 IMU
onboard_peripherals.notes: 6-axis gyroscope + accelerometer. Always on the I2C bus

onboard_peripherals.name: 3 Buttons
onboard_peripherals.notes: 3 physical buttons. GPIO 37/38/39 are input-only without pull-down, need `Pin(37, Pin.IN, Pin.PULL_UP)` in code

onboard_peripherals.name: I2S Speaker
onboard_peripherals.notes: Onboard speaker. GPIO25 can be released when not in use

onboard_peripherals.name: TF Card Slot
onboard_peripherals.notes: TF card slot shares SPI bus (shares MOSI/CLK with LCD), only additionally occupies CS=GPIO4. Release GPIO4 when TF card is not used

onboard_peripherals.name: Power Management IC (IP5306)
onboard_peripherals.notes: I2C shares bus with MPU6886, address 0x75. Manages battery charging and discharging

onboard_peripherals.name: USB-to-UART (CP2104)
onboard_peripherals.notes: USB serial chip, connected to GPIO1/3. UART0 is occupied

notes: GPIO Matrix can be remapped via software, but hardware bus resources are extremely limited:
- I2C: Onboard already occupies SDA=21/SCL=22 (shared by MPU6886 + IP5306)
If connecting external I2C sensors, they can share the bus if addresses don't conflict; otherwise use SoftI2C on other GPIOs
- SPI: Onboard already occupies MOSI=23/CLK=18, MISO can be 19 or 38 (LCD uses 38, TF card uses 19, sharing MOSI/CLK)
If connecting external SPI devices, CS can be any free GPIO, other pins share the bus with onboard peripherals
- UART: Only UART0 (TX=1/RX=3), already occupied by USB serial chip
If connecting external UART devices, use SoftUART on other GPIOs
- Among them, 0/2/12/15 are strapping pins, use with caution
- Among them, 37/38/39 are occupied by buttons (input-only + buttons), effectively unusable
- Among them, 25 is occupied by I2S speaker (always_used=false, can be released)
- Among them, 4 is occupied by TF card CS (always_used=false, can be released)
